message:
tests: update TUI snapshots for rendering changes

Update tui_snapshot.rs test module and all snapshot files.

Test code changes:
- Minor adjustments to snapshot test setup

Snapshot updates (all 17 files):
- tui_assistant_with_thinking.snap
- tui_footer_with_usage.snap
- tui_initial_state.snap
- tui_input_bash_mode.snap
- tui_input_multi_line.snap
- tui_input_single_line.snap
- tui_multi_turn_conversation.snap
- tui_scrolled_viewport.snap
- tui_single_assistant_message.snap
- tui_single_user_message.snap
- tui_status_message.snap
- tui_streaming_text.snap
- tui_streaming_thinking.snap
- tui_system_message.snap
- tui_tool_output_message.snap
- tui_tool_running.snap
- tui_wrapped_message.snap

These snapshots capture the current TUI rendering output for
regression testing. Updates reflect minor layout/styling changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   │ >
   │ >
